mentions.note: Claude shows 40% of users intend to use it more vs. only 6% less—extraordinary purchasing intent and pricing power. This is the deal Cramer wants investors in, ahead of SpaceX and OpenAI.

Claude AI platform shows 40% of users intend to increase usage vs. only 6% less—extraordinary net +34 vs. 1% average brand. Cramer says this is the deal to own (vs. SpaceX or OpenAI). Pricing power evident; could raise prices without alienating users. Investment vehicle for AI upside.
Real enterprise revenue growing; but valuation concerns on transition to public markets; IPO timing adds risk to broader market stability.
AI models layer company. Recently joined Nvidia platform, contracting large GPU capacity, part of competitive buildout.
